items.title: 2 more Jalen Johnson stats...
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
2 more Jalen Johnson stats...

5th player in NBA history to average at least 22 points, 10 rebounds, and 7 assists in a season, joining Big O, Wilt, Jokic, and Westbrook.

Also became the 1st Hawk ever to be top-20 in the NBA in points, rebounds, and assists in the same season.

items.title: Jamal Murray makes his first All-NBA team. Scottie Barnes snubbed. Jalen Johnson didn’t have an overall better year than him imo. Luka and Cade becoming eligible hurt Barnes, Jaylen Brown (second team instead of first) and KAT, amongst others.
items.author: Wolstat
items.body_excerpt:
Jamal Murray makes his first All-NBA team. Scottie Barnes snubbed. Jalen Johnson didn’t have an overall better year than him imo. Luka and Cade becoming eligible hurt Barnes, Jaylen Brown (second team instead of first) and KAT, amongst others. 
No LeBron for first time in decades

items.title: Hawks forward Jalen Johnson was selected to the 2025-26 All-NBA third team.
items.author: Brad Rowland
items.body_excerpt:
Hawks forward Jalen Johnson was selected to the 2025-26 All-NBA third team.

Johnson averaged 22.5 points, 10.3 rebounds (7th in NBA), and 7.9 assists (5th in NBA) per game.

Johnson joins Nikola Jokic as 1 of only 2 players to finish in the top 8 in both rebounds and assists.
